transcript: 15 shri food for 15 days. Glutinous rice flour, sugar, hot water. Knead until it forms into a ball. Like this. Roll it out. Cut it into 10 pieces. You don't want to add any filling. All you have to do is just roll them into little balls. Make a hole in the middle. Add in the red bean paste. Push the filling down with your thumb while closing it up. Once it's closed, roll until it's smooth. Coat the rice balls with water. Coat with sesame seeds. For 6-7 minutes or until golden brown. Trick that my grandma taught me. When it starts floating, we're going to press it down and it's going to double in size. Look. At. That.

timestamps.text: Glutinous rice flour, sugar, hot water. Knead until it forms into a ball.
Like this. Roll it out. Cut it into 10 pieces.
You don't want to add any filling. All you have to do is just roll them into little balls.
Make a hole in the middle. Add in the red bean paste.
Push the filling down with your thumb while closing it up.
Once it's closed, roll until it's smooth.
Coat the rice balls with water. Coat with sesame seeds.
For 6-7 minutes or until golden brown.
Trick that my grandma taught me.
When it starts floating, we're going to press it down and it's going to double in size.
